headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -33.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 9% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 125 quotes including 99 at strong intensity - people are venting heavily but this represents a pullback from yesterday's peak.

• At 42.7, frustration levels remain well above the typical range, sitting in the upper quarter of the 78-day period.

• Optimism recovered significantly from yesterday's deep low but still sits below average, while fears dropped further into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
